name: The Sandusky Depot Platform
description: A long plank platform facing the main track, its station lamp casting a yellow circle that makes the surrounding dark look absolute — the last consist cleared forty minutes ago and the platform is empty except for wind-blown leaves.
atmosphericDetails: The iron horse's last passage left a heat shimmer on the rails that has not yet fully faded.
A posted schedule board shows no further departures until six in the morning.
Boot prints in the coal dust near the platform edge — at least two sets, one of them with a distinctive worn heel.
